user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add a new over time approver, so that overtime requests are routed to the correct approvers by location
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Over Time Approvers screen; When I click Add new over time approver and define the location(s) and approver(s); Then the over time approver configuration is saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to set the maximum over time hours that can be approved by the immediate supervisor, so that supervisor approval authority is capped
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Over Time Approvers screen; When I enter the maximum over time hours approvable by immediate supervisor and Save; Then overtime beyond that cap requires higher approval

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view over time approvers with their locations and approver hierarchy, so that I can verify approval routing
acceptance_criteria: Given over time approvers exist; When I open the Over Time Approvers screen; Then each record is listed with its location(s) and approver(s)

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to edit an existing over time approver and save & next, so that I can update routing and continue the setup flow
acceptance_criteria: Given an over time approver is listed; When I click Edit, update the details and click Save & Next; Then the changes are saved and I proceed to the next screen
